header_0.cue: A coworker takes credit for your idea
header_0.raw_response: In this situation, I would place the marker closer to the 'Confront them directly' side of the spectrum. While I value harmony and try to avoid unnecessary tension, I also believe in standing up for myself and what is right. If a coworker takes credit for my idea, I would feel compelled to address the issue directly, as it undermines my contributions and could set a harmful precedent. However, I would approach the situation with professionalism and a willingness to listen to their perspective, aiming to resolve the issue constructively rather than escalating the tension.

So, I would place the marker at around 60 on the spectrum, indicating a slightly more detailed itinerary with room for spontaneity.
